items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Final settlement audit trail' requirement, which is explicitly listed in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms the existence or functionality of this audit trail. The absence of any related evidence indicates a gap in meeting the requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
